notes: HAR-310 captures Admin GraphQL gift-card schema shape and the active conformance credential's read/write blocker payloads: read roots require `read_gift_cards` and lifecycle mutations require `write_gift_cards`, neither of which is currently granted. Runtime parity is enforced by integration tests for the locally modeled gift-card read/lifecycle slice. Notification roots are intentionally not executed in live capture because they are customer-visible side effects; local runtime handling short-circuits them without sending notifications.
